declaration_semantics.statement: This inventory declares known root authority surfaces and their governance classifications. It does not validate live runtime state. A surface appearing here with declared_containment_class CLASSIFIED_OPEN means that surface is acknowledged to exist and is classified — not that it is currently monitored or actively constrained at runtime.
declaration_semantics.inventory_ne_validation: inventory = declared classification of known surfaces; validation = runtime enforcement (out of scope for this artifact)
declaration_semantics.declared_containment_class_definition: The declared_containment_class is the governance classification assigned by the referenced source documents — not a live-state assertion.
declaration_semantics.source_primacy: declared_classification_basis lists the source documents that define each surface's classification. Those documents are authoritative; this inventory is a consolidation reference.

surfaces.description: GitHub repository owner/admin authority — branch protection bypass, force-push, workflow mutation, settings mutation, secrets write
surfaces.declared_evidence_rule: EVIDENCE_ONLY — admin bypass evidence may classify an epoch as illegitimate; it may not create merge or deploy legitimacy

surfaces.description: GitHub branch protection rules — enforcement, bypass conditions, required reviewers, status checks
surfaces.declared_evidence_rule: EVIDENCE_ONLY — branch protection bypass evidence forces NULL for the affected merge epoch; it may not create merge legitimacy

surfaces.description: GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch — invocation of governed or ungoverned workflows with inputs
surfaces.declared_evidence_rule: GOVERNED — dispatch is constrained by canonical chain validation; residual risk exists if canonical chain endpoints are compromised

surfaces.description: GitHub repository and environment secrets write authority — CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL, MINDSHIFT_API_KEY, MINDSHIFT_DEPLOY_SECRET
surfaces.declared_evidence_rule: EVIDENCE_ONLY — secret mutation evidence classifies affected epochs as illegitimate; it may not create deploy or execution legitimacy

surfaces.description: Cloudflare account-level deploy authority — Git Integration (automatic deploy on push), API-level deploy, Workers & Pages admin
surfaces.declared_evidence_rule: EVIDENCE_ONLY — Cloudflare deploy events outside governed pipeline classify affected epochs as illegitimate; they do not create deploy legitimacy
surfaces.declared_open_action: Disable Cloudflare Git Integration at Cloudflare account level — requires account administrator action

surfaces.description: Authenticated local wrangler CLI session — direct production deploy capability outside governed pipeline
surfaces.declared_evidence_rule: EVIDENCE_ONLY — local wrangler deploy events classify affected epochs as illegitimate; they do not create deploy legitimacy

surfaces.description: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and equivalent credential authority — Workers:Write scope, scoping, rotation, and OIDC binding
surfaces.declared_evidence_rule: EVIDENCE_ONLY — token-based deploy events outside governed pipeline classify affected epochs as illegitimate

surfaces.description: Local terminal shell and canonical serialization code mutation — direct infrastructure mutation outside governed pipeline
surfaces.declared_evidence_rule: EVIDENCE_ONLY — infrastructure mutation events classify affected epochs as illegitimate; they do not create execution or deploy legitimacy

surfaces.description: Federated legitimacy roots — external federation evidence that might be treated as authoritative
surfaces.declared_evidence_rule: EVIDENCE_ONLY — federation evidence may classify distributed state; it may not create legitimacy
